metadata.description: EstreGenesis self-hosted Claude Code plugin marketplace — seven plugins, all Apache-2.0, mirroring the EG repo's main branch. **estregenesis** is the entry point: the kit plugin that makes adopting EG a command instead of a hunt for a raw GitHub URL — /egboot (bootstrap a new project onto the seed), /egmig (migrate an existing project that already has its own rule files), /egup (upgrade a seeded project's seed + plugins), /egmem (reconcile agent memory with the project's governance docs), /egrich (full arm: seed + all six modules, wired and verified). The six module plugins are the optional layer the seed references: **constellation** (live multi-agent orchestration — WS board server + A2A messaging + dashboard + MCP server), **superscalar** (parallel-dispatch scheduling discipline — issue width, speculation gate, in-order retire), **hyperbrief** (decision delegation — 9-section JSON IR + deterministic renderers + MCP server + escalation hooks), **greatpractice** (practice codification — capture-eager / promote-deferred, 3-tier macro/mezzo/micro, /routinize), **ultrasafe** (pre-release security fan-out — 8 attacker perspectives + clean-signal gate; advisory in v0.2.x, never blocks a publish), **compendium** (controlled vocabulary — one definition per concept, plain + expert registers, pointer-not-paraphrase to the owning spec, gardening lints + MCP server). Each plugin loads and degrades cleanly on its own; the modules are independent and skipping any leaves the rest working. Install: `/plugin marketplace add SoliEstre/EstreGenesis` then `/plugin install <name>@estregenesis-plugins` — or install `estregenesis` and let `/egrich` wire the rest. Per-cut detail lives in the repo CHANGELOG.md, which is the version SSoT.

plugins.name: estregenesis
plugins.description: The EG kit plugin — EstreGenesis itself, as skills instead of a copy-pasted URL. Five canonical procedures, four of them with a short alias that points at it rather than copying it: **eg-bootstrap** (`/egboot`) — new project: pick the seed tier (Master / Lite / Compact × EN / KO), install it as `.agent/seed_prompt.md` with its version marker intact, run the seed's Bootstrap mode (AGENTS.md SSoT + per-tool bridges + .agent/ scaffold). **eg-migration** (`/egmig`) — existing project that already has rule files (CLAUDE.md, .cursor/rules/, copilot-instructions, an ad-hoc AGENTS.md): audit them, classify the migration mode (M1 scattered-rules / M3 hybrid), run the seed's Migration A or C, and account for every existing rule — promoted into AGENTS.md or dropped with its reason recorded. **eg-upgrade** (`/egup`) — seeded project: read the seed's version marker, diff it against the upstream CHANGELOG (the version SSoT), present an additive numbered delta menu (local edits win; nothing is overwritten), then refresh the EG plugins the project actually installed. **eg-memsync** (`/egmem`) — reconcile agent memory with the project's governance docs: detect five drift kinds in both directions (memory-supersedes-doc, dangling references, memory-only durable policy, duplicated-content-one-copy-stale, outdated identifiers), resolve by direction of authority (dated memory beats undated doc prose; repo reality closes stale state-memories; genuine contradictions are surfaced, never auto-picked), and promote memory-only durables into the docs under four boundaries (lifecycle maturity, practice-vs-charter destination split, the seed boundary /egup owns, pointer-not-paraphrase for definitions) with a public-repo redaction gate. **egrich** — full arm: the seed plus all six optional modules, their plugins, hooks and MCP servers, wired and verified — with the cost stated up front and the cheap discipline-only subset (Superscalar + Greatpractice + Compendium: rules and a lint, no background processes) named so that 'everything' stays a choice rather than a default. Each skill routes to the right sibling when you pick the wrong one, so you do not need to know the taxonomy to start. The skills fetch the seed and run it; they never restate it (so they cannot go stale against it) and never reconstruct it from memory (if it cannot be fetched, they stop and say so rather than inventing your project's charter). No hooks, no MCP server, 0 npm deps — this plugin is procedure, not runtime.

plugins.name: constellation
plugins.description: Live multi-agent orchestration client for Claude Code. Connects to a separately-running Constellation WebSocket server (user-provisioned; canonical reference impl at constellation/reference/runtime/server.cjs in this repo). MCP server exposes 5 tools (board_state_get / board_history_tail / agent_list_get / a2a_emit / a2a_wait_ack — tier='decided' application-tier extension included), 8 skills, and a Stop hook bundling pre-send-probe.cjs. v0.3.26 / Constellation v2.4.52 — peer key kind (pk- prefix · ?peerKey= · peer wire role): another project's main joins as a §13.9.3 peer-main instead of riding an upstream key; dashboard gains a peer tab group + Main↔Peer/Peer↔Peer/Peer↔Collab lazy monitors + a prompt-target selector on the injection row; key UI gains the 🤝 피어메인 radio/tab; /join/peer onboarding; KEY-MGMT v0.4. v0.3.25 = boardsweep wording-precision patch (post-ship adversarial verify: agent-authored-scope framing, generic tone/policy wording, current[] add-missing clause). v0.3.24 adds /boardsweep — one full board true-up over every component except the realtime chat (done[] identifiers verified against the VCS, shipped planned items migrated, resolved decisions closed, current corrected, registry pruned, tone/schema normalized); retrospective accuracy only, the forward-looking counterpart /roundnext keeps scheduling. v0.3.12 / Constellation v2.4.12 대시보드 XSS 하드닝 (첨부 iframe sandbox + mermaid textContent 주입, Playwright 5/5 PASS). v0.3.11 / Constellation v2.4.11 보안 하드닝 (secure-by-default 127.0.0.1 bind + WS_BIND opt-in + WS_MAX_FRAME 프레임 상한 + credential gitignore 정정). v0.3.10 / Constellation v2.4.10 PR system §13.22 distill (RRP→정식 스펙: two-level PR + 5 wire vocab + topology + approval + state machine) + deadlock 서버 detector opt-in (§13.19.10 Q3, WS_DEADLOCK_DETECT 기본 OFF). v0.3.9 / Constellation v2.4.9 dashboard A2A 대화 카드 통일 + 인라인 re>summary 우선 (코디네이션 메시지 + 미분류 객체 CUSTOM 을 a2acard 로 통일). v0.3.8 / Constellation v2.4.8 dashboard EstreUF-parity 5-gap (검토사안 0뱃지 숨김 + 발신-시각 보존 + 닫은세션 영구삭제 크로스보드 동기/persist + SelectionResolved 라우팅-무관 처리 + 그룹선택 멤버탭 틴트). v0.3.7 / Constellation v2.4.7 단일 워크스페이스 멀티에이전트 session-aware routing (register-all + fail-safe) — 다중 세션 공유 Stop hook cursor 경쟁을 CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID + .agent-sessions.json 레지스트리로 분기 (미등록/식별불가=SKIP-ALL fail-safe, 자기 소유 inbox 만 처리). register-session.cjs (신규) + pre-send-probe routing + join-local v2.4.7 (local 워커 outbox drain + full inbound 로깅) + server.cjs WS_PRIMARY_AGENT 경고 + dashboard .ws-collab-* cursor:move leak fix. ≤5초 file Monitor 2층 기상 권장. v0.3.6 / Constellation v2.4.6 dashboard A2A 대화 UI 확충 — 7 additive surfaces: sticky popup header (스크롤 가림 방지) + 날짜변경선 sticky top:0 + A2A-intent CUSTOM 카드 (WS_A2A_INTENT 18 intent dict — Report·BlockerManifest·ReviewSLAAck·PR* 7종·Deadlock/Preempt 3종·Mediation 2종·Escalation 2종 — + summary helper + card builder + §13.16.12 Pattern 7 TEXT_MESSAGE fallback envelope 승격) + 첨부 칩/미리보기 모달 (wsAttachments/wsAttIcon/wsAttChipEl/wsAttPreview, mime별 이모지 + sha256 title + 👁/⬇) + SelectionPrompt chip 카드 #406 UI6 (issued/answered/cancelled + multiSelect + allowFreeText + SelectionAnswer/SelectionCancel emit + SelectionResolved cross-board dim) + 닫은 세션 삭제 UI3 (개별 🗑 + 전체 🗑 + 연결상태 dot + DeleteChannelHistory CUSTOM emit) + self-attestation confirm/prompt 자체 다이얼로그 (wsConfirm/wsPrompt Promise 헬퍼 — browser confirm/prompt 의존 제거로 IDE webview 환경 호환). 프로토콜 wire 변경 없음. v0.3.5 / Constellation v2.4.5 incident hardening — 4-layer guard against duplicate-agentId reconnect-loop runaway: single-instance helper (deps-0) + 4 client guards (ws-agent-client + join-local + watchdog; local-bridge retains its takeover guard) + pre-send-probe runaway protection (PROBE_RUNAWAY_BYTES 32 MiB cap + meaningful surface cap 50 + auto cursor tail-advance) + runaway-recover tool (readline streaming allowlist extraction). v0.3.4 / Constellation v2.4.4 dashboard UI augment — 4 corner-anchored position presets + drag/resize anchor normalization + legacy left/top migration + settings modal ⚙ + fab right-click context menu (center / key-issue / key-manage / settings) + folder emoji + header spacing compression. v0.3.3 / Constellation v2.4.3 ships Ultrasafe A2A-intent family integration (§13.16.9 A2A-intent allowlist + 4-group classification table A2A-intent row + new §13.16.13 wire-spec sub-section): 5 new intent names (ULTRASAFE_FINDING / ULTRASAFE_ITERATION_BOUNDARY / ULTRASAFE_RELEASE_GATE / SECURITY_DISCLOSURE_INTAKE / MPCVD_COORDINATION) + dual-mode advisory/blocking ack_tier mapping + cross-module Hyperbrief paired DECISION_REQUEST + Greatpractice candidate flow + Superscalar retire-barrier composition + board-mirror render policy per intent. Additive minor — wire compatible with v0.3.2 adopters. v0.3.0 / Constellation v2.4.0 ships KEY-MGMT (WS-PROTOCOL-KEY-MGMT.md v0.2): 5 canonical messages (KeyIssue/KeyList/KeyRevoke/KeyLabel/AgentNameChanged) + 5-state machine (ISSUED→ACTIVE→REVOKED_PENDING→REVOKED→DELETED) + key.json atomic-write persistence + 14-day TTL + main-only permission gating + immediate/sessionEnd revocation modes + UI4 발급 패널 + UI5 키 관리 모달 (목록/revoke/label rename). RegisterUpstreamKey transitional alias retained. Plus v2.3.23 dashboard reference parity (upstream invite UI + onboarding md channel guide). Without a running WS server the plugin loads cleanly and degrades gracefully. npm dep: ws ^8.18.0.

plugins.name: superscalar
plugins.description: Execution-scheduling discipline for parallel sub-agent dispatch. Wraps Superscalar.md v0.4.2 as a model-invoked skill: issue_width formula (effort_band + pace_mode + Little's Law + Kanban WIP + autonomy_available_workers) + worktree-isolated reorder buffer + cost-benefit gate (~30-60k token-horizon crossover) + opt-in speculation + adoption thresholds + n=8 dogfood ledger (Entry 05 + Entry 06 controlled A/B showing 'parallelism is not sufficient; orchestration discipline produces consistency') + v0.4.1 §3.1 Hyperbrief decision-delegation interlock (write/deploy/send lanes pass through both cost-benefit gate AND hyperbrief-trigger-check; read-only lanes exempt). 0 npm deps / 0 env.

plugins.name: hyperbrief
plugins.description: Decision-delegation gating discipline. Wraps Hyperbrief.md v0.6.0 as 3 model-invoked skills (hyperbrief-trigger-check + hyperbrief + hyperbrief-revisit) + JSON IR schema (FullBrief + BlockedStub variants) + 4 templates (MD + HTML × FullBrief + BlockedStub) + deterministic Node renderer (mini-engine.cjs with self-engineered placeholder substitution + 3-axis × 5-level tone profile + ajv schema validation) + MCP server exposing 4 tools (hyperbrief_render / hyperbrief_validate / decision_ledger_append / decision_ledger_query) + PreToolUse + Stop hooks in advise mode (4-way review-queue routing: Constellation board / standalone placeholder / setup-ask / silent). v0.5.6 adds the §5.6.7 + MUST-19 skill-side auto-localize discipline (button label + trigger phrases follow the user's prevailing conversation language; EN/KO/JA reference literals in spec). Cross-module integrations active: Constellation §13.16.9 (5 A2A intent names + ack_tier='decided') + Superscalar §3.1 (orthogonal gate at write/deploy/send lane retire). §11.5 v1.0 readiness rubric (Lens A 7-dim module-wide GA / Lens B 6-dim host-specific marketplace registration) shipped. 4 self-applied dogfood entries + adopter bundle 008. npm dep: ajv ^8.17.0.

plugins.name: greatpractice
plugins.description: Memory-triggered practice-codification discipline. Wraps Greatpractice.md v0.3.2 as 3 JSON schemas (entry-frontmatter.schema.json + hook-spec.schema.json + voice-rules.schema.json placeholder) + 1 PreToolUse contact hook (outbox-json-validate.cjs). v0.2.0 / v2.5.61 mezzo 8-batch ratification cut: release-cadence.md (macro) §2.3 의 8 mezzo decomposition candidates 를 Workflow wk5a6jh5k 병렬 fan-out 으로 한꺼번에 ratify (n-way-sync-registry / package-files-validate / bin-entry-validate / link-integrity-check / dry-run-smoke-test / pre-publish-user-gate / naming-hygiene-grep / auth-2fa-discipline). 5-axis maturation 분포 24/24/22/21/19/19/19/17. ~1850 lines added. v0.1.0 (2026-06-04 cut) 의 1 macro + 1 mezzo (outbox-json-validation) 구조에서 1 macro + 9 mezzo 로 확장 — children decomposition pattern 의 first batch demonstration. Targets the 'quiet omission' surface — small obligations that should accompany the work (update docs alongside code, check before sending, sync paired surfaces) but slip through as memory notes accumulate. agent-workspace memory feedback (memory/feedback_*.md or equivalent) is the input trigger; raw signals route through a 5-axis multi-criteria maturation gate (frequency + depth + recency + cost + predictability weighted sum, threshold ≥ 18 OR 3-criterion notability gate) into a 3-tier macro/mezzo/micro hierarchy. Ratified entries are enforced via deterministic lifecycle hooks (SessionStart blocking · UserPromptSubmit path-scoped inject · PreToolUse 3-subtype poka-yoke contact/fixed-value/motion-step · PostToolUse SSoT propagation · Stop cycle-end probe · PostCompact working-set restore). phronesis_boundary field carves out judgement-heavy work that should NOT be codified. Frontmatter is governance SSoT (9/9 cross-axis universal convergence). Backed by 9-axis cross-domain deep research (harness · humanities · psychology · management · processor · os · sre · memoization · canonical). Normative foundations (v0.3.2, adversarially verified — §B.5/§B.6): Clark-Chalmers coupling criteria (Distributed Cognition; the crucial-vs-arguable ranking grounds the tier split, but the criteria are necessary-not-sufficient per the cognitive-bloat boundary) + DiMaggio-Powell 3-isomorphism (Organizational Anthropology; the isomorphism-inhibits-innovation reading is empirically contingent, with no evidence-based numeric mandatory cap). v0.3+ roadmap: 8 mezzo entries 의 micro decomposition + manifest hash + renderers + voice linter + MESI multi-agent coherence + CMMI L4 effectiveness measurement. 0 npm deps (v0.2.0).

plugins.name: ultrasafe
plugins.description: Pre-release / pre-update simulated penetration testing discipline — v0.2.x runtime activation cut (advisory mode; v0.2.1 = ship-surface alignment doc patch). Wraps Ultrasafe.md v0.2.1 substantive spec (~3522 lines, +978 since v0.1.0) with the runtime layer: 8 attacker SKILL.md (ultrasafe-ai-llm-redteam · ultrasafe-web-api-attacker · ultrasafe-supply-chain-auditor · ultrasafe-crypto-reviewer · ultrasafe-social-engineer · ultrasafe-methodology-compliance · ultrasafe-threat-model-lifecycle · ultrasafe-synthesizer) implementing the 8-agent parallel red-team fan-out + 2 hooks (PreToolUse `ultrasafe-trigger.cjs` matcher=Bash detects publish-equivalent commands and emits ULTRASAFE_RELEASE_GATE advisory + Stop `ultrasafe-clean-signal.cjs` evaluates 4-condition AND-gate at cycle-end and emits ULTRASAFE_ITERATION_BOUNDARY) + MCP server `server.cjs` exposing 5 stdio JSON-RPC tools (ultrasafe_run_fanout · ultrasafe_finding_aggregate · ultrasafe_clean_signal_check · ultrasafe_report_generate · ultrasafe_release_gate). 5 new Constellation A2A intents integrated per Constellation v2.4.3 §13.16.13 wire-spec (ULTRASAFE_FINDING per-attacker emit + ULTRASAFE_ITERATION_BOUNDARY ≥3-iteration boundary marker + ULTRASAFE_RELEASE_GATE publish-time gate state + SECURITY_DISCLOSURE_INTAKE external disclosure entry + MPCVD_COORDINATION Multi-Party Coordinated Vulnerability Disclosure) + dual-mode advisory/blocking ack_tier mapping (advisory v0.2.x = received-tier; blocking v0.3+ = decided-tier reusing Hyperbrief application-tier ladder) + cross-module integration (Hyperbrief paired DECISION_REQUEST on severity ≥ high + Greatpractice macro/mezzo entry candidate flow for ratified findings + Superscalar retire-barrier composition at iteration boundaries). v0.2 advisory invariant: all outputs (skill recommendations / hook emissions / MCP tool returns) carry `advisory` flag — NEVER block publish in v0.2.x. Blocking mode (v0.3+) introduces user gate via paired Hyperbrief DECISION_REQUEST. 3-layer synthesis report (OSCAL Assessment Result + Hyperbrief 9-section IR + Greatpractice tree candidate) generated by synthesizer attacker. ≥3 iteration loop with 4-condition AND clean-signal gate (regression-free + monotonic finding-reduction + coverage-floor + 2 iter consecutive). Backed by 17-axis cross-domain deep research (harness · web-api-infra · ai-red-team · threat-modeling · multi-agent-distributed · adversarial-ml · fuzzing-pbt · supply-chain-sbom · devsecops-policy-as-code · incident-response-disclosure · cryptography-key-mgmt · human-factors-se-opsec · game-theory-asymmetry · compliance-standards · cognitive-decision-bias · security-visualization-dashboard · protocol-trust-evolution) — see reports/2026-06-05-ultrasafe-research/. Three architectural backbones: parallel attacker-perspective fan-out (16/17 axes cross-convergence) + cross-axis synthesis at retire-barrier (15/17 axes) + ≥3 iteration multi-condition AND clean-signal termination (14/17 axes). Tier A 5 critic patches absorbed inline (broker surface deep-dive + coverage methodology + schema evolution + regression baseline + strict-mode reconciliation). Normative grounding: Schneier asymmetry + Herley cost-asymmetry + population-level trust erosion (HTTP→HTTPS analog). npm dep: ajv ^8.17.0 (MCP server schema validation).

plugins.name: compendium
plugins.description: Concept-anchored dual-register vocabulary substrate — v0.2.1 runtime (content store + lint/pointer-resolution + §10 8-tool MCP server; dashboard surfaces deferred v0.2.x). Wraps Compendium.md, EstreGenesis's 6th module and the purest expression of north-star axis-2 (vocabulary survival > code survival): a markdown wiki of cross-module concept pages + a concept-anchored dual-register glossary (internal/expert term <-> general/plain term <-> one shared definition) + a cross-link/click-to-define system. Owns nothing normative — every entry resolves to a one-directional pointer into the owning module spec (Constellation/Superscalar/Hyperbrief/Greatpractice/Ultrasafe = SSoT); the sole exception is general-register vocabulary no module owns (owner_spec=null), for which Compendium is the legitimate SSoT. Also the relocation home for deprecated vocabulary (status:superseded + superseded_by redirects — axis-3 eviction first-class) and it models its own eviction. Right-sized v0.1 ships the concept-anchored model + frontmatter schema + content-boundary charter (pointer-not-paraphrase + one-directional authority) + ~25-term EG seed vocabulary exemplars + 4 gardening lints + pointer-resolution check (verify-nway 13th axis form fixed). Promotion is a single count->queue-Hyperbrief-brief gate; hysteresis/debounce automation, click-to-define a11y component, multi-tab split, MCP runtime, and dashboard board surfaces are named prunable units deferred to v0.2+. 0 npm deps.
